arch.name: Arch Linux
arch.description: Minimal rolling-release distro for full system control and customization.

debian.name: Debian
debian.description: Stable, conservative base system used for servers and secure desktops.

fedora.name: Fedora Workstation
fedora.description: Cutting-edge Linux distro backed by Red Hat with strong security defaults.

qubes.name: Qubes OS
qubes.description: Security-by-isolation OS using VM compartmentalization for every app.

tails.name: Tails OS
tails.description: Amnesic live system routing all traffic through Tor for anonymity.

nixos.name: NixOS
nixos.description: Declarative Linux system with reproducible configurations.

alpine.name: Alpine Linux
alpine.description: Ultra-minimal, security-focused distro widely used in containers.

pacman.name: Pacman (Arch)
pacman.description: Fast package manager for Arch-based systems.

apt.name: APT (Debian/Ubuntu)
apt.description: Standard package manager for Debian-based systems.

dnf.name: DNF (Fedora)
dnf.description: Modern package manager for Fedora and RHEL systems.

snap.name: Snap
snap.description: Containerized app distribution system by Canonical.

tor.name: Tor Browser
tor.description: Anonymous browsing via onion routing network.

proton_vpn.name: Proton VPN
proton_vpn.description: Privacy-focused VPN with strong encryption and no-logs policy.

dnscrypt.name: DNSCrypt-Proxy
dnscrypt.description: Encrypted DNS resolver with filtering and anti-tracking.

ufw.name: UFW (Uncomplicated Firewall)
ufw.description: Simple interface for Linux iptables firewall control.

firewalld.name: Firewalld
firewalld.description: Dynamic firewall manager used in Fedora/RHEL systems.

wireshark.name: Wireshark
wireshark.description: Deep packet inspection and network analysis tool.

lynis.name: Lynis
lynis.description: Security auditing tool for Linux systems.

apparmor.name: AppArmor
apparmor.description: Mandatory access control system for application confinement.

selinux.name: SELinux
selinux.description: Kernel-level security module enforcing strict policies.

fail2ban.name: Fail2Ban
fail2ban.description: Blocks brute-force attacks by banning suspicious IPs.

veracrypt.name: VeraCrypt
veracrypt.description: Disk encryption for full volumes and containers.

gpg.name: GnuPG (GPG)
gpg.description: OpenPGP encryption for files and communications.

cryptsetup.name: Cryptsetup (LUKS)
cryptsetup.description: Disk encryption layer used in most Linux full-disk encryption setups.

htop.name: htop
htop.description: Interactive process viewer for Linux systems.

btop.name: btop
btop.description: Modern system monitor with CPU, RAM, and network graphs.

docker.name: Docker
docker.description: Container platform for isolated application environments.

podman.name: Podman
podman.description: Daemonless container engine with rootless execution support.

git.name: Git
git.description: Version control system for tracking code changes.

radare2.name: radare2
radare2.description: Reverse engineering and binary analysis framework.
